final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce landing page hero section UI mockup for a skincare brand called "LUMEA BEAUTY", feminine Japanese beauty market.

Style/medium: clean flat UI mockup, bright and airy editorial layout, soft feminine aesthetic with floral accents, Figma/Sketch design presentation style
Composition: full-width desktop landing page hero layout, three-column hero section — left copy column, center model photo, right product display column; header bar at top, benefit cards row at bottom
Subject: complete landing page mockup with the following structure —

HEADER: logo "LUMEA BEAUTY" on the left; 5 navigation links ["特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ"] centered; CTA button "今すぐ試す" on the right

HERO LEFT COLUMN:
• Headline: "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。" in large bold Japanese type
• Subheadline: "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。" in smaller body text
• 3 pill-shaped feature badges with small icons: ["敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える"]
• 3 bullet points with pink checkmark icons: ["美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア"]
• 2 CTA buttons: primary filled button "初回限定で試してみる >" and secondary outlined button "成分をチェック >"
• Trust badge strip: "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし"

HERO CENTER: young East Asian woman smiling, touching her cheek, holding a dropper bottle of serum; photographed with soft diffused lighting against a light background

HERO RIGHT COLUMN:
• 2 product items: a moisturizing boost serum dropper bottle and its packaging box, rendered cleanly
• 3 floating white rounded-rectangle stat cards with gold accents: ["満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破"]

BOTTOM SECTION: 3 horizontal white rounded-rectangle benefit cards with icons: ["うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"]

Scene/backdrop: pure white or very light blush background with soft purple floral accent elements (small flowers, petals) scattered decoratively
Lighting/mood: soft diffused natural light, bright and airy, no harsh shadows, gentle and approachable mood
Color palette: soft pink as primary brand color, white as base, purple flower accents, gold for stat card details; pink used for CTA buttons and checkmarks
Materials/textures: smooth flat UI surfaces, white rounded-rectangle cards, pill badges, subtle drop shadows on floating elements, clean sans-serif Japanese typography
Text (verbatim): "LUMEA BEAUTY", "特徴", "成分", "お客様の声", "使い方", "FAQ", "今すぐ試す", "鏡を見るたび、うるおう透明感。", "乾燥・くすみが気になる肌に。美容成分を贅沢に配合した、毎日のための集中保湿美容液。", "敏感肌OK", "高保湿", "朝晩使える", "美容成分をしっかり届ける", "ハリ・ツヤのある印象へ", "続けやすいシンプルケア", "初回限定で試してみる >", "成分をチェック >", "送料無料 / 初回限定 / 定期縛りなし", "満足度 96%", "美容成分 5種配合", "愛用者 12,000人突破", "うるおい", "透明感", "使いやすさ"
Constraints: all Japanese text must be legible and correctly rendered; UI must read as a realistic desktop browser mockup at full width; layout must feel balanced across three hero columns; product dropper bottle must be clearly identifiable
Avoid: dark backgrounds, harsh shadows, cluttered layout, generic stock-photo aesthetic, misrendered or garbled Japanese characters, neon colors, masculine design language
